answer: Top Neurons is an initiative of Pratham Shiksha Charitable Trust, based in Jaipur, Rajasthan. Its vision is to create a society where every talented student, regardless of financial background, has equal access to quality education and opportunities for success.

To be eligible for the Top Neurons program, students must have:

1. Passed Class 10th in the 2025-26 academic session with:
   - 85% or above for CBSE Board
   - 90% or above for other state boards
   - 92% or above in Science and Maths for RBSE Board
2. Combined annual income of parents should not exceed INR 3,50,000.
3. Should be from an economically weaker section.
4. Should not have a parent or guardian who is a permanent employee of the government, PSU, or a public limited company.
5. Should be willing to take the Science stream (Physics, Chemistry, Maths, and/or Biology) in standard 11th.
Top Neurons was earlier associated with Allen Career Institute, Jaipur, but it is now associated with Narayana Coaching, Jaipur.

You will get coaching from a top coaching institute in India, specifically from Narayana Coaching Center, which has an excellent track record of outstanding results in NEET, IIT-JEE, and other competitive exams. The coaching classes will be held in person in Jaipur, Rajasthan.
Yes, you will get free P.G. Accommodation (hostel) in Jaipur, which will be provided to all selected students.
I don't have that information. Please contact TopNeurons directly.

You can apply by visiting the TopNeurons website (www.topneurons.org) and filling out the online application form. Make sure to provide all necessary details, including academic qualifications and family income information.

The last date to apply for Top Neurons Program is 30th June 2025, and for Batch-7 (2026-2028), the application form opens on 16 January 2026, but the last date is not specified in the given context for Batch-7.
